notes: Compile-Time Evaluation wave in closure phase. Compile-time-evaluation stub retired: compiler/consteval/ package provides a pure evaluator (VKInt / VKBool / VKChar values round-tripped through typetable), a const-fn purity checker (rejects FFI / non-const calls / unsafe / spawn / closures / mutable borrows / interior-mutable names), a substitution pass that rewrites PathExpr -> LiteralExpr for const / static / array-length / enum-discriminant SymIDs before monomorphization, and size_of / align_of intrinsics routed through typetable layout queries. Driver wires CheckRestrictions -> Evaluate -> Substitute strictly between check.Check and monomorph.Specialize. HIR FnDecl / ConstDecl / StaticDecl / EnumDecl / Variant gained SymID fields populated by the bridge. Lower picked up a CastExpr passthrough and a Fuse-suffix-aware integer-literal parser. Proof: const_fn.fuse evaluates recursive 'const fn factorial(5u64) = 120' at compile time and main returns FACT_5 as I32; TestConstFnProof asserts exit code 120. STUBS.md W14 history block appended; WC014 logged using Rule 10.2 mandated 6-field template. Eighth full wave under Rule 9.5 three-commit discipline: P00 audit (3ecee62), implementation (see preceding SHA), PCL (this commit). Next: enter W15 MIR consolidation.
